name: Dynamite Chili with Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Dried pinto beans (soaked overnight then drained)
1/2 green bell pepper (cored, seeded and chopped)
2/3 pound Boneless pork, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
1/3 pound Beef stew meat, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
Freshly ground black pepper to taste
2 tablespoons Prepared tortilla flour mixed with water (or 1 cup Masa harina, mixed with water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and beans in a medium saucepan; bring to boil over medium-high heat.
2. Reduce heat and simmer until tender, about 1 hour.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add onion, green bell pepper, and garlic; sauté until tender.
4. Transfer mixture to a Dutch oven; set aside.
5. Add pork and beef to the skillet; brown well.
6. Stir into vegetables in the Dutch oven; add beans and their liquid along with tomatoes and seasonings. Mix well; cover and simmer 1 hour.
7. Add wine and cook, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Season with salt and pepper. If the mixture is too liquidy, stir in some of the tortilla flour paste to thicken.
9. Serves 4
